summary: This update adds new Fabled HUD max title beta features, an Explore Map mode for Better Travel, expanded Folklore Forest map sorting and Ultimate Checkmark data, and a batch of UI improvements, bug fixes, and reliability updates.

details.title: Fabled HUD Max Title Beta Features
items: Added a "HUD: Show random max title text" beta feature that cycles through a variety of fun and silly custom max title texts
Added a "HUD: Show custom max title text" beta feature that allows you to set your own custom max title text
Added a "HUD: Show progress bar at max title" beta feature that keeps the progress bar visible at max title instead of replacing it with the max title text
Added a "fake-fabled" feature flag that enables the Fabled HUD beta features and replaces the progress bar with max title text for all ranks

details.title: Better Travel
items: Added an "Explore Map" beta feature that hides location markers and travel details, as well as resets certain areas to the base map until you hover over them
Added Folklore Forest Grand Tour and Folklore Forest Finale sorting data for maps
Fixed travel menu handling when the current location is not present in the menu

details.title: Ultimate Checkmark
items: Added Folklore Forest Grand Tour and Folklore Forest Finale treasure chests
Added Folklore Motif-Index: Hydro, Law, and Tactical codexes
Added Dragon's Eye, Kalor'ignis Rib, Fort Rox Portal Console & Core, Idea Germ, Pearl of Wisdom, Rainbow Nib, Warpath Portal Console & Core to Currency

details.title: Location HUDs
items: Updated a few other Location HUD styles and edge cases

details.title: Other
items: Improved performance, memory usage, and reliability across various modules and utilities
Miscellaneous UI improvements and bug fixes across various modules
